name_cn:
Genuine leather, Mini in stock!!️
D-Joy bag Sheepskin 2023 model. Fashion is indeed a cycle; it returns to the vintage Diana rectangular bag shape. The short chain + slender shoulder strap is simply god-tier!! Strong retro and trendy feel, suitable for any occasion, absolutely the ceiling of ladies. It has broken out of the circle, sisters!
Size: 16*5.5*10cm
